items.title: VYVE SEO/AEO Action Plan Ready for Review
items.summary: UPQODE has delivered the enhanced SEO/AEO action plan PDF including two-milestone payment structure and Google Ads campaign ($1k/month minimum for 3 months). Awaiting review and approval to proceed with formal agreement.
items.actionNeeded: Review the attached SEO/AEO action plan PDF and approve to proceed with formal agreement.
